headline: Starmer NO-YIELD 🍆🔒 to Trump Iran War THREATS 💣🇮🇷
text:
UK PM Keir Starmer 👨‍💼🇬🇧 dropping BALLS 🥎💪 telling Trump 🍊🤑 'NOT GONNA YIELD 😤🚫, no joining your Iran WAR PARTY 💥🇮🇷!' After Donnie MAGA King 👑🐸 warned Sky News 📺 'UK GHOSTED 👻 us when we NEEDED backup – SPECIAL RELATIONSHIP? WITH WHO? 🤷‍♂️😂!' Threatening to FLIP that THICC trade deal 📜💰 on cars 🚗, steel 🦾 & alu – 'CAN ALWAYS BE CHANGED 😈🔄!' Starmer in Commons 🔥: 'My mind SET 🔒, NOT in our NATIONAL INTEREST 🏰 to dive into this MEAT GRINDER 🥩💥 – WE OUT 🕺!' Lib Dem Ed Davey 👀 probing, but Keir SLAYS: 'Clear from DAY 1 📅, not getting DRAGGED 👋 into YOUR war bby!'

Trump ROASTING 🔥 Starmer non-stop since Feb Iran BLOWUP 💣🕌, calling him 'NO Winston Churchill 🧔🚫' for dodging US-Israel OFFENSIVE 🛡️🇮🇱 – 'They weren't THERE when we NEEDED 'em 😢, SAD! 😭' But UK spokesperson SIMPING HARD 🤤: 'Special relash STILL THICC 💦 across TRADE 💹, DIPLO 🤝, SECU 🔒 – BIGGER than ONE BEEF 🍖!' Chancellor Rachel Reeves 💅😡 in DC 🌆 at IMF SUMMIT 🏦 spilling TEA ☕ on Trump's 'FOLLY 🤡' – 'WE DIDN'T START THIS 🔥, no EXIT PLAN 🚪❌, FRUSTRATED AF 😤 – UK growth SLASHED 📉 to 0.8% cuz ENERGY SPIKE ⛽📈 hits us HARDEST 🥺!'

Trump soft on Starmer tho: 'I LIKE him 👍 but UK IMMI & ENERGY POLICIES INSANE 🤪💨!' Royal visit? NO DRAMA 👑👸 – 'King Charles WONDERFUL MAN 👨‍👑, known him FOREVER ⏳, can't wait for April TEA TIME 🍵🏰!' Meanwhile IMF CRYING 😭 over UK eco PAIN from oil JOLTS ⚡⛽ – Starmer HOLDING FIRM 🧱 like a BOSS 😎, Trump TROLLING 🧌 but trade TARIFFS hanging by THREAD 🧵😏! Will Donnie NUKES the deal 💣📜 or Starmer BEND? STAY TUNED 📺🍿 for this TRANSATLANTIC SHAKEUP 🌊🇺🇸🇬🇧 – NO YIELDING, KEIR'S GOT THAT SPINE 🦴🔥!
